pages.text: Reflect $(l)20% of incoming damage$() back at attackers. Best used when you expect repeated direct hits.
Negates fall damage. One of the cleanest traversal and safety relics in the mod.
Deal $(l)30% more damage$() to enemies below $(l)30% health$(). This is a finisher relic.
Prevents one lethal hit, then leaves you alive with emergency Absorption and Regeneration. Default cooldown: $(l)5 minutes$().
Deal $(l)25% more damage$() to undead, and undead kills grant a burst of Strength. A dedicated anti-undead relic.
